# Interface: SpecificationConfig

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:49](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L49)

Adapter configuration passed to the specification facets at setup time.

### baseUrl?

```ts
optional baseUrl?: string;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:51](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L51)

Base URL of the website under test (website facet only).

### browser?

```ts
optional browser?: () => Promise<BrowserPort>;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:57](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L57)

Lazy browser accessor (website facet only). The first `.visit()`
launches the shared browser instance; `.fetch()`-only spec files never
pay the browser cost.

#### Returns

`Promise`\<[`BrowserPort`](BrowserPort.md)\>

### database?

```ts
optional database?: DatabasePort;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:65](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L65)

### databaseKeys?

```ts
optional databaseKeys?: string[];
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:71](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L71)

Keys of the declared services record that are databases. Drives the
CONVENTIONS A7 rule: with 2+ databases the `database` option is
mandatory on `.seed()` / `.table()`; with exactly one it is forbidden.

***

### dockerConfig?

```ts
optional dockerConfig?: DockerSpecConfig;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:73](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L73)

### dockerTestRunId?

```ts
optional dockerTestRunId?: string;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:80](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L80)

Unique id shared by every spec from this runner instance.
Stable for the runner's lifetime so multi-step tests (spawn in
one run, inspect in another) see the same container scope. The
facet factories auto-populate this when `dockerConfig` is present.

***

### external?

```ts
optional external?: "allow" | "block";
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:63](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L63)

Cross-origin request policy for visits (website facet only): `'block'`
aborts requests leaving the site under test — the browser-side analog
of strict intercepts.

***

### interceptDisabledReason?

```ts
optional interceptDisabledReason?: string;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:85](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L85)

When set, `.intercept()` is unavailable on this runner and throws this
reason immediately (compose mode — MSW is in-process, CONVENTIONS I3).

***

### services?

```ts
optional services?: Record<string, ServiceHandle>;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:94](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L94)

The declared services record. In cli mode, drives the automatic
connection-URL injection into the child env (CONVENTIONS B6):
`<KEY>_URL` per service, plus `DATABASE_URL` / `REDIS_URL` when
unambiguous.

***

### transform?

```ts
optional transform?: (text) => string;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/builder.ts:99](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/builder.ts#L99)

Optional normaliser applied to command stdout/stderr before every
comparison. Does not mutate the raw `.text` accessor.

| ------ | ------ |
| `text` | `string` |
